  • Uses of Country in com.risk.strategy

    Methods in com.risk.strategy with parameters of type Country
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    AggressiveStrategy.attack(Country attacker, String attackerNum, Country defender, String defenderNum, boolean isAllOut)
    Attack method always attack with the strongest country until it cannot attack anymore
    void
    BenevolentStrategy.attack(Country attacker, String attackerNum, Country defender, String defenderNum, boolean isAllOut)
    Attack method never attacks
    void
    CheaterStrategy.attack(Country attacker, String attackerNum, Country defender, String defenderNum, boolean isAllOut)
    Attack method automatically conquers all the neighbors of all its countries
    void
    HumanStrategy.attack(Country attacker, String attackerNum, Country defender, String defenderNum, boolean isAllOut)
    Method for attack operation
    void
    PlayerBehaviorStrategy.attack(Country attacker, String attackerNum, Country defender, String defenderNum, boolean isAllOut)
    attack method
    void
    RandomStrategy.attack(Country attacker, String attackerNum, Country defender, String defenderNum, boolean isAllOut)
    Attacks a random number of times, each attack chooses a country as attacking country and one of its adjacent enemy countries as defending country
    void
    AggressiveStrategy.fortification(Country source, Country target, int armyNumber)
    Fortification method maximize aggregation of forces in one country
    void
    BenevolentStrategy.fortification(Country source, Country target, int armyNumber)
    Fortification method move armies to weaker countries
    void
    CheaterStrategy.fortification(Country source, Country target, int armyNumber)
    fortification method doubles the number of armies on its countries that have neighbors that belong to other players.
    void
    HumanStrategy.fortification(Country source, Country target, int armyNumber)
    Method for fortification operation
    void
    PlayerBehaviorStrategy.fortification(Country source, Country target, int armyNumber)
    fortification method
    void
    RandomStrategy.fortification(Country source, Country target, int armyNumber)
    Randomly fortificates a country by a random number of armies
